rss.title: April 2026 — GitHub-backed registry connections arrive in cloud
rss.description: selftune cloud can now bind GitHub App installations to an org, manage repo-backed registry connections, and receive signed GitHub webhooks as the foundation for GitHub-native skill publishing.

bullets: Added GitHub App installation binding for cloud orgs so a team can associate

rss.title: April 2026 — creator-loop artifacts are now canonical in SQLite
rss.description: selftune now stores canonical eval sets, generated unit tests, and unit-test run results in SQLite first, while mirroring them to the old file paths for compatibility.

bullets: Moved canonical eval sets, generated unit tests, and unit-test run results

rss.title: April 2026 — dashboard creator-loop actions write canonical artifact paths
rss.description: selftune now makes dashboard-triggered eval generation and unit-test generation write directly to canonical config paths instead of dropping relative artifacts into the current working directory.

bullets: Updated dashboard-triggered `generate-evals` to pass the canonical

rss.title: April 2026 — dashboard rollback actions route through evolve rollback
rss.description: selftune now launches dashboard-triggered rollback actions through the supported `evolve rollback` CLI path instead of a non-existent top-level rollback command.

bullets: Fixed local dashboard rollback actions to spawn `selftune evolve rollback`

rss.title: April 2026 — evolution rail header no longer paints a solid strip
rss.description: The shared skill report evolution rail now keeps the sticky Evolution heading transparent instead of forcing a background color over the panel.

rss.title: April 2026 — structured progress for eval generation and unit-test generation

rss.title: April 2026 — passive update status in the local dashboard
rss.description: selftune now shows cached update availability in the local dashboard status surfaces instead of injecting unsupported update chatter into every creator-loop run.

bullets: Added cached update availability metadata to the local dashboard health

rss.title: April 2026 — cleaner proposal focus behavior in local dashboard
rss.description: The local dashboard now avoids forcing a default proposal selection so deep-linked proposal pages stay stable and action placement stays focused on readiness.

rss.title: April 2026 — quieter dashboard actions and current OpenCode ingest support
rss.description: selftune now suppresses unsupported source-tree auto-update nags during local runs and ingests the current OpenCode SQLite schema without failing on legacy column assumptions.

rss.title: April 2026 — live creator-loop streaming in the local dashboard
rss.description: selftune now streams dashboard-triggered and terminal-run creator-loop commands into the local dashboard with live status and output updates.

bullets: Added a live action feed in the local dashboard so creator-loop runs show

rss.title: April 2026 — release automation repair and cleaner local dashboard flows
rss.description: selftune repaired OSS release automation, blocked unintended dashboard indexing, and tightened the proposal review experience in the local dashboard.

rss.title: April 2026 — multi-platform hooks and replay validation

rss.title: April 2026 — dashboard and trust model overhaul
rss.description: The local dashboard, creator pipeline, and autonomous improvement loop were hardened for more reliable monitoring and rollout decisions.

rss.title: March 2026 — full body evolution and synthetic evals
rss.description: selftune added full skill body evolution, synthetic eval generation, cheaper validation loops, and a live local dashboard server.

rss.title: March 2026 — status surfaces and community export
rss.description: selftune introduced status and last summaries, a local dashboard, Claude transcript backfill, and opt-in community contribution export.

rss.title: February 2026 — initial selftune launch
rss.description: The first public release introduced the CLI, Claude Code hooks, session grading, trigger evaluation, evolution, and post-deploy monitoring.
